About this component

Hermetic Scroll Compressor — the heart of the refrigeration circuit

The scroll compressor draws low-pressure vapour in through the suction port, compresses it between two interleaved scrolls, and pushes high-pressure hot gas out of the discharge port toward the condenser. The motor and scroll set are sealed inside the welded hermetic shell, cooled by the returning suction gas. Everything you can service in the field — terminals, ports, valves, mounts — is on the outside, and that's exactly what this model lets students explore.
